title: git-submodules-status upstream mapping
description: Maps each submodule (per repository root .gitmodules) to the git remote name that points at the upstream repository. Each submodule_name should appear at most once.

submodule_name.description: Must match the [submodule "…"] key in the repository root .gitmodules.

upstream_name.description: Name of the git remote inside that submodule checkout (e.g. the GitHub org remote).
